name: python3-fontawesomefree
title: python3-fontawesomefree
description:
Python module Font Awesome Free (Python 3)
This package contains a Python module to be used with Django, leveraging how
Django handles static files.
.
The module exists in https://pypi.org/project/fontawesomefree/ but the Python
part is empty. This package is created for Kali and uses the existing node
files from the existing package node-fortawesome-fontawesome-free.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-fontawesomefree because Python module Font Awesome Free (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-fontawesomefree as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-fontawesomefree with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-fontawesomefree --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
